title: Windows Certutil Download or Decode
description: Detects usage of certutil.exe to download files from URLs or decode Base64 payloads, a common LOLBin abuse technique.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*certutil.exe' and ('Command Line' like '*urlcache*' or 'Command Line' like '*decode*' or 'Command Line' like '*encode*' or 'Command Line' like '*-urlcache*' or 'Command Line' like '*-decode*')))
